pi_items.verified_value: Nx Witness VMS is a real video management system developed by Network Optix

pi_items.source: Verified in setup_nx_witness.sh lines 320, 341, 365 and task_utils.sh line 232. Port 7001 confirmed as default HTTPS port in setup_nx_witness.sh line 9 and https://support.networkoptix.com/hc/en-us/community/posts/16800938628247
Verified in task_utils.sh line 16 and setup_nx_witness.sh line 6. NetworkOptix documentation confirms 'admin' is the default username.
Set in setup_nx_witness.sh line 7 (NX_ADMIN_PASS) and task_utils.sh line 5. This is a specific password configured for this test environment during system initialization.
Created in setup_nx_witness.sh line 199 (CAMERA_NAMES array index 1). Confirmed in setup_task.sh line 15 which retrieves 'Entrance Camera' by name.
Specified in task.json description and setup_task.sh line 30. This is the username to set for the camera's credentials in the task.
Specified in task.json description and setup_task.sh line 30. This is a task-specific password; no default from Nx Witness documentation.
Verified in install_nx_witness.sh lines 41, 50-52. Confirmed on https://updates.networkoptix.com/default/index.html and https://support.networkoptix.com/hc/en-us/articles/360042751193

Used throughout task_utils.sh (lines 4, 14, 39, etc.) and setup_nx_witness.sh. Confirmed in NetworkOptix REST API documentation at https://support.networkoptix.com/hc/en-us/articles/32766279894679-The-HTTP-REST-API

pi_items.verified_value: Virtual test cameras created using Nx Witness testcamera tool found in /opt directory
pi_items.source: Verified in setup_nx_witness.sh lines 141-169. The testcamera tool is part of the real Nx Witness installation and creates RTSP cameras discovered by the server.

privileged_info_summary: This task uses a real Nx Witness VMS system (developed by Network Optix, a legitimate video surveillance company). The system runs on https://localhost:7001 and is accessed via Web Admin at https://localhost:7001/static/index.html with admin credentials admin/Admin1234!. The task involves editing camera credentials for an 'Entrance Camera' (a virtual test camera created during setup) to username 'camuser' and password 'Cam@SecurePass2024'. The system is properly initialized with the REST API available at /rest/v1 endpoints using Bearer token authentication. The Nx Witness versions used are 5.1.5.39242 (primary) and 6.0.1.39873 (fallback), both downloaded from the official Network Optix update server.
